title: goldfussia austini
intro: Goldfussia austini, also known as Goldfussia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to Hawaii and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goldfussia austini include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Goldfussia austini can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
